title: COMPOST: VERMICOMPOST
subtitle: This factsheet contains complementary information to the Best4Soil video on Compost: Vermicompost
description: A factsheet providing complementary technical information on vermicomposting processes and its advantages over thermophilic composting, produced by Best4Soil under the EU Horizon 2020 Programme. It outlines production methods, quality control, regulatory considerations, and practical applications of vermicompost for high-value crops.
